description: Cultural imports (Importaciones) and exports (Exportaciones) from the DANE CSECC product-level supply-use balances, by product × area × year, 2014–2024, in million COP (current prices). USD column is ETL-derived.
source: DANE — Cuenta Satélite de Economía Cultural y Creativa (CSECC), release 2022–2024pr
currency: COP million (value_cop_million); USD million is derived, see fx_cop_usd_annual
note_no_bop_module: The CSECC has no balance-of-payments module; these figures are the import/export rows of the product-level supply-use balances. No bilateral partner detail. Imports valued CIF / precios básicos, exports a precio comprador (see source_concept column).
